text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 70 

ENRLMT_END_DT 

LABEL: Enrollment End Date (Within Calendar Year) 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates the date at which a beneficiary’s enrollment in Medicaid or CHIP is terminated. If the 
enrollment episode is terminated after December 31 of the calendar year, this date is edited to 
December 31 of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: ENRLMT_END_DT 

LONG NAME: ENRLMT_END_DT
